people.text: Olivia wants a funny film for her younger sister. It must be suitable for children and she prefers stories about animals.
Ethan likes science fiction with exciting action scenes. He does not enjoy slow films and wants impressive special effects.
Mila wants a romantic film, but she dislikes sad endings. She prefers something light and modern.
Noah enjoys documentaries about real people. He is especially interested in music and how artists become successful.
Zoe wants a mystery film with clever clues. She does not want anything frightening or violent.

texts.text: The First Song follows a young singer from small local concerts to international fame. This [9]documentary[/9] includes interviews, early recordings and the singer’s family memories.
Paws on Holiday is a cheerful comedy about a dog and a cat who get lost at the seaside. It is [6]suitable for children[/6] and full of [6]funny animal adventures[/6].
The Long Winter is a slow historical drama about a family living in a mountain village.
Love in April is a modern romantic comedy about two neighbours who keep meeting by accident. It has a [8]happy ending[/8] and a light, humorous style throughout.
Stars Beyond Earth is a fast-moving science-fiction film with spaceship battles, dangerous missions and [7]impressive visual effects[/7]. The story begins quickly and has little quiet dialogue.
The Missing Key is a gentle mystery in which a student solves a puzzle using [10]clever clues[/10]. There are no violent scenes, and the story is more playful than scary.
Goal Season is a sports film about a football team trying to win the final match.
Dark Harbour is a serious thriller with frightening scenes and a complicated police investigation.

answers.explanation: Olivia needs a child-friendly funny animal film.
Ethan wants exciting science fiction with effects.
Mila wants a light romance with a happy ending.
Noah wants a music documentary about real success.
Zoe wants a non-violent mystery with clues.
